trigger: Participant asks what the pilot is.
action: Answer with public-safe information and private contact path.
publicBoundary: No real data in public chat.

trigger: Participant wants to pause before submitting.
action: Pause private workflow and confirm next option.
Stop processing and apply retention/deletion rule.

trigger: Participant asks to correct private record.
Incident or safety risk is reported.
action: Escalate privately and pause intake if needed.

trigger: Founder/business owner may disclose sensitive detail.
action: Use minimised private fields or stop collection.

trigger: Material may require cultural protocol review.
action: Stop public collection and route privately.
